title: Text-to-Speech
description: Configure TTS providers and auto-apply settings

autoModes.offDesc: Agent can use TTS tool manually

responseFormat.label: Output Format
responseFormat.help: Audio encoding returned by the API (mp3, opus, aac, flac, wav, pcm).

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.help: System-level style prompt — only supported on gpt-4o-mini-tts model.

stability.label: Stability
stability.help: 0 = more expressive variation, 1 = more consistent and stable.

similarityBoost.label: Similarity Boost
similarityBoost.help: How closely output matches the original voice clone (0 = creative, 1 = similar).

style.label: Style Exaggeration
style.help: Amplifies voice style. 0 = none; higher values add more expressiveness.

useSpeakerBoost.label: Speaker Boost
useSpeakerBoost.help: Enhances voice clarity and target speaker similarity.

applyTextNormalization.label: Text Normalization
applyTextNormalization.help: How numbers and abbreviations are expanded (auto, on, or off).

seed.label: Seed (Advanced)
seed.help: Set a fixed seed for reproducible output. 0 = random.

languageCode.label: Language Code
languageCode.help: ISO 639-1 language hint, e.g. 'en' or 'vi'. Advanced.

edge.hint: Edge TTS is free and requires no API key. Install with: pip install edge-tts

rate.label: Speech Rate
rate.help: Rate adjustment in percent. -50% = much slower, +100% = much faster.

pitch.label: Pitch
pitch.help: Pitch shift in Hz relative to neutral. Range: -50 Hz to +50 Hz.

volume.label: Volume
volume.help: Volume adjustment in percent. -50% = quieter, +100% = louder.

pitch.label: Pitch
pitch.help: Pitch shift in semitones. -12 = one octave down, +12 = one octave up.

emotion.label: Emotion
emotion.help: Emotional tone applied to the synthesized voice.

textNormalization.label: Text Normalization
textNormalization.help: Whether numbers and symbols are expanded before synthesis.

format.label: Audio Format
format.help: Output encoding: mp3, pcm, flac, or wav.

sampleRate.label: Sample Rate
sampleRate.help: Audio sample rate in Hz. Leave as Default for most use cases.

bitrate.label: Bitrate (MP3 only)
bitrate.help: MP3 bit rate in bps. Only applies when format is mp3.

gemini.audioTagsHint: Insert expressive tags like [laughs] directly in your text

audioTagsPanel.title: Audio Tags
audioTagsPanel.insertHint: Click a tag to insert at caret

voice_save_config_first: Save API key first to load voices

empty_state.title: TTS not configured
empty_state.description: Configure a TTS provider to enable voice for agents.
empty_state.non_owner_hint: Contact the workspace owner to configure TTS.

test.sample_text: Hello, this is a voice test.

playground.title: Test Playground
playground.requiresProvider: Select a provider above to enable test playback.
